case_title: YAN DUBINSKY VS. JAVIER ANTONIO PUENTES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUBINSKY, YAN AS TO DEFENDANT PUENTES, JAVIER ANTONIO
